site.name: Farmetra
site.description: A global agricultural sales platform connecting vetted Chinese supply programs with importers, distributors, retail sourcing teams, and trade offices.

header.eyebrow: Direct Farm Sourcing with End-to-End Export Delivery
header.summary: Buyer-facing export portfolio with supplier programs, route visibility, customs handling, and cold-chain coordination for international agricultural trade.

hero.title: Qualified Agricultural Export Programs
hero.subtitle: Connecting Global Buyers with Vetted Chinese Supply Sources
hero.description: Transparent sourcing, documented supplier readiness, and coordinated export logistics for serious agricultural trade partners.

supplierQualification.title: Supplier Qualification
supplierQualification.description: Verified production capacity, export licenses, and quality documentation.

exportCoordination.title: Export Coordination
exportCoordination.description: Route planning, customs documentation, and cold-chain management.

commercialClarity.title: Commercial Clarity
commercialClarity.description: Transparent pricing, volume tiers, and payment terms.

responseCommitment.title: Response Commitment
responseCommitment.description: 48-hour first response to all buyer inquiries.

step1.title: Browse & Qualify
step1.description: Review supplier programs and product specifications.

step2.title: Submit Inquiry
step2.description: Detail your sourcing requirements and volume targets.

step3.title: Receive Proposal
step3.description: Get tailored pricing and logistics recommendations.

step4.title: Confirm & Ship
step4.description: Finalize terms and coordinate export delivery.

cta.title: Ready to Source?
cta.description: Connect with qualified agricultural suppliers for your import needs.

products.title: Export Portfolio
products.description: Browse qualified agricultural supply programs from verified Chinese exporters.
products.empty: No products found matching your criteria.

rfq.title: Inquiry Desk
rfq.subtitle: Submit your sourcing requirements for qualified supplier matching.

form.productsPlaceholder: Describe the products you're looking to source...
form.volumePlaceholder: e.g., 10 tons per month, 1000 kg quarterly
form.success: Inquiry submitted successfully. We'll respond within 48 hours.

guest.title: Quick Inquiry
guest.description: Submit an inquiry without creating an account. You'll receive updates via email.

registered.title: Buyer Inquiry
registered.description: As a registered buyer, your inquiry will be tracked in your workspace.

login.title: Buyer Login
login.subtitle: Access your sourcing workspace and inquiry history.

footer.description: A buyer-facing agricultural platform for sourcing, qualification, and cross-border sales coordination.
footer.bestFitDescription: Importers, retail sourcing teams, foodservice distributors, and institutional buyers.
footer.focusDescription: Supplier qualification, commercial clarity, and structured inquiry-to-delivery coordination.
